nasb.text: Let the lying lips be mute, Which speak arrogantly against the righteous With pride and contempt.

esv.text: Let the lying lips be mute, which speak insolently against the righteous in pride and contempt.

cnv.text: 那些逞驕傲，態度輕慢， 說話狂傲攻擊義人的， 願他們說謊的嘴唇啞而無聲。

ccb.text: 愿你堵住撒谎之人的口， 他们骄傲自大， 狂妄地攻击义人。

csbs.text: 愿撒谎的嘴唇哑然无声—— 它们因着自高和轻慢，向义人说狂傲的话。
